description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, dark gray coloration, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The crossguard is simple and slightly curved, providing protection for the wielder's hand. The handle is cylindrical, black, and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a rounded metallic pommel. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. The proportions and construction suggest it is intended for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, simple crossguard, and a black cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the blade, crossguard, and handle with pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard visible as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, black, possibly wrapped or textured, rounded metallic pommel
